title: cyathobasis fruticulosa
intro: Cyathobasis fruticulosa, also known as the bushy cyathobasis, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Cyathobasis fruticulosa is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, and its roots and leaves are commonly used in traditional remedies.
